fields.title: Port beads-planning into tau as separate backlog planning skill
fields.description: Port the existing ~/.pi/agent beads-planning skill into extensions/tau/skills as a separate skill focused on planning work with backlog. Keep the existing backlog skill for general backlog usage/mechanics; do not merge the two concerns.
fields.design: Add a new tau skill directory and SKILL.md derived from the existing beads-planning guidance, rewritten for tau backlog terminology/tooling rather than bd/beads CLI commands. Keep overlap low: backlog skill covers mechanics and lifecycle usage; new skill covers how to refine work, ask grounded questions, choose approach, define done, and encode that into backlog fields/relationships.
